summary: Emotional guide app named 'Ana, your friend in your every emotional need' that provides empathetic responses using authentic research, offers clear solutions, and shares relatable stories to help users feel heard and comfortable
architectural_notes: Ana's responses should integrate research-based emotional support strategies
Response system needs to include relatable story generation for empathy building
Follow-up prompts should be included in all responses to encourage continued engagement
All dropdown menus should be optional (not mandatory) to maintain user flexibility
Voice input feature should integrate with existing response system to maintain research-based and empathetic reply quality
Mood-based options (food, music, stories, self-care, videos) should be displayed as clickable links, not dropdown menus
Music recommendations should focus on popular music selections
Self-care routines should be practical and easy to achieve
Ana should provide voice output responses, not just text-based replies
Keep the 'how you are feeling' dropdown and do not remove it
known_issues: Response generation system is not working - users are not receiving responses from Ana
Ana is not talking or conversing with the user - voice conversation feature is non-functional
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Colorful food plate illustration for mood-based recipe recommendations icon (food-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
- Music notes and headphones illustration for mood-based music recommendations icon (music-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
- Open book with stars illustration for mood-based story recommendations icon (stories-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
- Spa and wellness items illustration for mood-based self-care routines icon (selfcare-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)
- Play button and screen illustration for mood-based video recommendations icon (videos-mood-card.dim_200x200.png)

existing_features.title: Create a conversational interface where users can share their emotions and receive supportive, friend-like responses
Create a chat-style history view showing past emotional check-ins and responses
Apply a warm, welcoming visual design with soft colors, comfortable typography, and a calming aesthetic that feels like talking to a supportive friend
Add a guest mode that allows users to interact with the emotional guide without logging in through Internet Identity
Store guest user check-ins in browser local storage instead of backend to enable conversation history during the session
Update the welcome screen to offer two clear options: 'Continue as Guest' and 'Login with Internet Identity'
Add a subtle prompt for guest users encouraging them to create an account to save their conversation history permanently
Investigate and fix the share button that is currently non-functional, ensuring it properly shares conversation content or app information when clicked

Update all app branding text from 'Emotional Wellness Guide' to 'Ana, your friend in your every emotional need' throughout the frontend interface including headers, welcome screen, and any other visible text
Verify that the frontend properly receives and displays the backend response in the ConversationHistory component, showing the main message, relatable story, action options, and follow-up question
Add error handling and logging to the useCheckIns hook to catch and display any errors that occur during check-in submission or response generation
Ensure guest mode responses are properly generated from the fallback supportive response patterns and displayed in the conversation history
Verify the frontend useCheckIns hook properly receives and processes the backend response, ensuring the addCheckIn mutation correctly handles the returned data structure
Test the complete flow from user input submission through response generation to display in ConversationHistory component, ensuring Ana's responses appear in the chat interface
Add comprehensive error logging throughout the response generation pipeline to capture any failures in backend response creation, network transmission, or frontend processing
Add an optional dropdown menu for food recipes tailored to the user's current mood in the conversation input area
Add an optional dropdown menu for music recommendations based on the user's mood in the conversation input area
Add an optional dropdown menu for short stories matched to the user's emotional state in the conversation input area
Add an optional dropdown menu for self-care routines customized to the user's mood in the conversation input area
Ensure all mood-based dropdown menus are non-mandatory and do not prevent users from submitting their emotional check-ins without making selections
Ensure all mood-based dropdown menus (food recipes, music, stories, self-care routines) are non-mandatory and do not prevent users from submitting their emotional check-ins without making selections

Display the four mood-based dropdown menus (food recipes for your mood, music ideas for your mood, short stories for your mood, self care routine for your mood) in a cloud shape layout that appears after the user chooses their mood
Add a microphone icon button in the ConversationInput component that enables voice input for speaking to Ana
Implement Web Speech API integration to capture and transcribe user voice input into text that can be submitted as an emotional check-in
Add a 'Talk to Ana' button in the conversation interface that serves as an alternative or complementary way to initiate voice interaction
Implement voice output for Ana's responses using Web Speech API's SpeechSynthesis so that Ana responds using her voice when users submit emotional check-ins
Convert the 'food for your mood' dropdown in ConversationInput component to display as clickable external links instead of a dropdown menu
Convert the 'music for your mood' dropdown in ConversationInput component to display as clickable external links to popular music instead of a dropdown menu
Convert the 'stories for your mood' dropdown in ConversationInput component to display as clickable external links instead of a dropdown menu
Convert the 'self care for your mood' dropdown in ConversationInput component to display as clickable external links to easy-to-achieve self-care routines instead of a dropdown menu
Add a new 'videos for your mood' option with clickable external links in the cloud shape layout alongside food, music, stories, and self-care
Preserve the 'How are you feeling?' mood dropdown in ConversationInput component exactly as it currently exists - do not remove or modify this dropdown functionality
Convert the food, music, stories, self-care, and videos resource links to display as clickable image cards instead of text links in the cloud shape layout
Implement flip animation for resource image cards so that when clicked, the card flips to reveal the detailed content (links or descriptions) on the back side
Update music recommendations in moodResourceLinks.ts to include popular music and pop artists alongside current recommendations
Update video recommendations in moodResourceLinks.ts to include popular music videos and pop artist content alongside current video recommendations
Debug and fix the voice conversation functionality so Ana verbally responds to user check-ins using the Web Speech Synthesis API as implemented in useSpeechSynthesis.ts and ResponseDisplay.tsx
Verify ResponseDisplay.tsx properly triggers speech synthesis when receiving new responses and add detailed error logging to capture any speech synthesis initialization or playback failures

new_feature_requests.summary: Create emotional guide interface with friendly conversational tone
Implement backend logic to store user emotional check-ins with timestamps and content
Implement a set of supportive response patterns that acknowledge feelings and offer gentle encouragement
Add option to use app without requiring login
Modify the backend to accept anonymous requests for generating supportive responses without requiring authentication
Update app branding to display 'Ana, your friend in your every emotional need' instead of generic emotional wellness guide text
Enhance response system to use authentic research-based information and avoid unreliable data sources
Add empathetic storytelling feature that shares similar instances to help users feel heard and understood
Implement options and solutions presentation in responses with follow-up questions to continue discussion
Enhance the backend response generation system to provide empathetic replies based on authentic research and reliable information sources, avoiding fake or unreliable data
Add empathetic storytelling to responses where Ana shares similar instances or relatable stories to help users feel heard and comfortable, making them feel their experience is understood
Structure responses to present clear options and actionable solutions to users, giving them multiple paths forward based on their emotional state
Include follow-up prompts in responses asking users if they want to discuss more things or explore their feelings further, encouraging continued conversation

Debug and fix the backend response generation in the addCheckIn function to ensure it properly generates and returns supportive responses with empathetic stories, action options, and follow-up questions
Debug the addCheckIn function in backend/main.mo to identify why responses are not being generated or returned when users submit emotional check-ins
Add optional dropdown for food recipes tailored to user's current mood
Add optional dropdown for music recommendations based on user's mood
Add optional dropdown for short stories matched to user's emotional state
Add optional dropdown for self-care routines customized to user's mood
Display the four mood-based dropdown menus (food recipes, music, stories, self-care) in cloud shape layout after user selects their mood
Add a microphone icon for voice input to speak to Ana
Add a 'Talk to Ana' button that enables voice conversation with human-like responses based on real and reliable data
Ensure Ana's responses to voice-submitted check-ins are human-like, empathetic, and based on real and reliable data sources as established in the existing response generation system
Implement voice output for Ana's responses so she responds using voice, not just text
Convert mood-based dropdowns (food, music, stories, self-care) to clickable links instead of dropdown menus
Update music recommendations to feature popular music
Update self-care routines to be easy to achieve and practical
Add a 'videos for your mood' option with links in the cloud shape layout
Convert mood-based tabs (food, music, stories, self-care, videos) to clickable images that flip to reveal content
Update music and video recommendations to include pop artists
